description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with default stages build, test, and deploy and global before_script and after_script sections that echo several informational messages before and after each job. In the build stage add a build job that runs echo "Do your build here". In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs echo "Do your deploy here". In the test stage add a test job that runs echo "Do a test here" then echo "For example run a test suite", and a test_parallel job that runs echo "Do another parallel test here" then echo "For example run a lint test". Also in the test stage add a test_python job that uses the python:3.5 Docker image and runs pip install -r requirements.txt.
